diagram:
WHERE OrderDate = '2024-01-10'

Orders(OrderDate) index exists

B-Tree root
   |
   +--> branch --> leaf[key='2024-01-10'] --> row pointers
prompt: Which condition most strongly encourages an Index Seek?
options: Predicate uses a function around the indexed column
No index exists on the filtered column
Highly selective predicate on an indexed column
Query requests every row from the table

feedback.correct: Exactly. High selectivity on an indexed column lets the engine seek directly to a small row subset.
feedback.incorrect: Incorrect. Think about selectivity and whether the engine can directly navigate the index tree.
